case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. ADALBERTO ELIAS HERNANDEZ

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-07-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO FEB-06-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. REPRESENTED BY GUADALUPE ACEVEDO, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT ADALBERTO ELIAS HERNANDEZ DID NOT APPEAR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,845.18 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT HERNANDEZ, ADALBERTO ELIAS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-07-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $55.00) SERVED DEC-04-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT HERNANDEZ, ADALBERTO ELIAS
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.
ORDER RE: CONTINUANCE FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT HERNANDEZ, ADALBERTO ELIAS CLAIM HEARING OF FEB-06-2019 OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL FILED
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 7/29/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
